name: Pirate Ghost Ship
short_description: "Step into the boots of Jack, trapped on a cursed pirate galleon. Solve dark mysteries, hide from the undead, and survive the wrath of a ghostly captain. Every decision you make determines if you'll find the treasure or become part of the ship's crew forever."
detailed_description:
Welcome to the Ghost Ship; Where Silence Screams Louder than Words...

🏴‍☠️ Pirate Ghost Ship: Silence or Death?

                                          Step into the realm of shadows, where every breath could be your last.

In Pirate Ghost Ship, you take on the role of Jack, a daring protagonist who boards a legendary, cursed vessel that has been drowned in blood and mystery for centuries. Your mission is more than a simple heist; you seek a cursed treasure map that holds the power to bridge the world of the living and the dead. But remember: on this ship, you are not the hunter—you are the prey.

💀 Key Features:

  • Survival Stealth Mechanics: Creep through the shadows and stay out of sight of the cursed crew. One small mistake will draw every vengeful spirit on the ship to your position.

  • Thrilling Action & Combat: When there is no way to hide, your blade and flintlock are your only allies against grotesque creatures and soulless sailors.

  • Immersive Horror Atmosphere: Experience a gripping blend of Inside and Fahrenheit style gameplay, filled with jump scares and a heavy, haunting atmosphere.

  • The Great Escape: From the dark depths of the hull to the final confrontation with the Captain; can you secure the map and escape by boat to the mysterious island?

🔱 "Explore the mystery of the Pirate Ghost Ship"

Created by a solo developer over two years this game is the result of dedication and passion. Your support truly means a lot.

幽霊船の谜を解き明かせ - 今すぐウィッシュリストに追加しよう！
